name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
labels: enhancement

## The problem

<!-- What are you trying to do that the current design doesn't
     support? Or what pain point does this feature address? -->

## The proposed solution

<!-- What should the device / config / doc do differently? -->

## Alternatives you considered

<!-- Other ways to solve the same problem, and why the proposed one
     is preferable. -->

## Breaking change?

- [ ] This would change the default GPIO pins
- [ ] This would change the AP fallback SSID or password
- [ ] This would change AQI thresholds
- [ ] This would rename entities visible in Home Assistant
- [ ] None of the above — purely additive
